visual_description: A man with thinning hair, wearing a dark shirt, is sitting and holding his head in his hands. A young child with blonde hair, wearing a grey sweatshirt, runs up to him and puts their arms around his shoulders in a hug. The man remains in the same position, with his head down.
audio_description: A child's voice is heard speaking, followed by a loud, sustained electronic tone.
